calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust Granting Personal Co-Trustee Exclusive Powers To Direct Investment Of Trust Funds, To Delegate Investment Functions To Investment Advisor And To Review The Investment Advisor'S Performance Of The Delegated Investment Functions
Off Calendar Dec-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Seth Skootsky for Wells Fargo Bank (Trustee).

Mr. Skootsky stated that there is no objection to the petition and that exhibit-A is to attached to the proposed order. The Court waives lack of exhibit-A being attached to the petition. The Court granted the Petition for Modification of Trust Granting Personal Co-Trustee Exclusive Powers to Direct Investment of Trust Funds, etc. (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos.
